abilities.description: When you commune with the spirits of a place, roll +heart. If you share a bond with someone there, add +1. On a strong hit, you are tethered. When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.ed490d43a2533506]{Journey} or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.3ff03b51f620ab26]{Undertake an Expedition} to return, you may roll +spirit or +heart (instead of +wits), and take +1 momentum on a hit. When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.edac426b7c23f060]{Finish an Expedition}, take +2 momentum on a strong hit. The tether is lost if you perform this ritual elsewhere, or when you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.ff17e67a59539df4]{Face Desolation}. On a weak hit, as above, but the spirits reveal a disturbing aspect of the place; @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.ff32c523829d6481]{Endure Stress} (-2).
As above, and you may also reroll any dice when you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.3de42d2d3cb78855]{Sojourn} in the tethered place.
When you perform this ritual, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit.
